title: Umami Juicy Argentinian Beef Stir-fry
description: This dish is a brunch-friendly Argentinean meal that features umami flavors and juicy beef alongside tomato puree for added depth.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely, optional for added flavor and color

ingredients.name: Cherry tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Halved, to add a pop of color and freshness

ingredients.name: Egg yolks
ingredients.notes: For the final layer and umami boost

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: To sauté and finish the dish

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the beef and veggies

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, add olive oil, and sauté chopped onion until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the skillet, stirring for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Season beef with salt and pepper on both sides. Grill or pan-sear until cooked to your desired level (medium-rare). Remove from heat and let rest.
In the same skillet, reduce heat to medium, add tomato puree, cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until the mixture starts to thicken slightly.
Slice the rested beef into strips and distribute them evenly in the pan with the tomato sauce. Let it sit over low heat for about 1 minute on each side to allow flavors to meld together.
In a separate bowl, combine egg yolks and salt. Season with pepper before pouring over the top of the stir-fry mixture. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beef until evenly distributed.
